scripts.emu: PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH firebase emulators:exec --project summa-board --only auth,firestore,storage,ui "NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_EMULATORS=true NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=summa-board NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=summa-board.firebasestorage.app FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=summa-board FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=summa-board.firebasestorage.app FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 next dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000"
scripts.test:close-poll: PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk/bin:$PATH firebase emulators:exec --project summa-board --only firestore "FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=summa-board FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=summa-board.firebasestorage.app node --experimental-strip-types --loader ./scripts/ts-alias-loader.mjs --test tests/close-poll-create-meeting.test.ts tests/create-meeting-with-daily.test.ts"
